44.reason: 错误：这里应该累加到后一段（loc[j+1].num）上，而不是前一段（loc[i].num），导致连接关系错误

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  错误：这里应该累加到后一段（loc[j+1].num）上，而不是前一段（loc[i].num），导致连接关系错误
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  错误：这里应该累加到 loc[j+1].num 上，而不是 loc[i].num，因为连接方向是从后往前，应该更新后一个线段（终点匹配前一个起点）的 num 值
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  累加方向错误，应该将loc[j+1].num加上loc[i].num
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Should be loc[j+1].num += loc[i].num; to accumulate from end to beginning of chain]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: The accumulation direction is reversed. It should be `loc[j+1].num += loc[i].num;` to correctly propagate the count from the current segment to the connected next segment.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  连续线段的计数应从右向左（x坐标从大到小）传递，即左侧线段应累加右侧相连线段的计数，此处累加方向写反，应改为 loc[j+1].num += loc[i].num;
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: should be updating loc[j+1].num with loc[i].num, not the other way around, because we are building chains forward from earlier segments to later ones after sorting in descending order. Also, the loop structure does not correctly propagate chain lengths.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: should be adding to loc[j+1].num from loc[i].num, not the other way around. Also, the loop structure does not correctly propagate chain lengths.]

27.reason: Declaring a large array locally may exceed stack limits and cause compilation errors; it also shadows the global array. Remove this local declaration to use the global one.
